name: Download Kubeconfig (8h)
description: Download a fresh kubeconfig from the RONE portal for an Elastic Runtime namespace. Token expires in 8 hours.

environment.description: Environment name in the Elastic Runtime table (e.g. hackathon-teams-poller)

steps.description: Click the Actions dropdown (dash icon) in the fixed-right table cell for the environment row
steps.notes: The Actions column is a sticky/fixed-right cell. The trigger is an <a> with class ant-dropdown-trigger containing a dash icon SVG. It may be off-viewport horizontally but is still clickable via JS.

steps.description: Click 'Download kubeconfig (8h)' from the dropdown menu
steps.notes: Menu item has data-menu-id ending in 'download'. The dropdown opens in the DOM but may render off-screen. The click triggers a file download to the browser's default Downloads folder.

steps.description: Copy the downloaded kubeconfig to the project config directory
steps.notes: After download, the newest .kubeconfig file in ~/Downloads/ should be copied to the project's config/ directory. Filename pattern: joelg-YYYYMMDDHHMMSS-runtime-prod.kubeconfig

elementNotes.actionsDropdown: The Actions column uses ant-table-cell-fix-right (sticky column). The dropdown trigger is an <a class='ant-dropdown-trigger'> containing an SVG dash icon. It's typically at x>1200 so off-viewport, but clickable via JS.
elementNotes.downloadMenuItem: Has data-menu-id ending in 'download'. Text content is 'Download kubeconfig (8h)'. Other menu items: 'Extend to expiration date', 'Ingress config', 'Transfer'.
elementNotes.downloadFile: Downloads to browser default Downloads folder. Filename: joelg-YYYYMMDDHHMMSS-runtime-prod.kubeconfig. File is a standard K8s kubeconfig YAML with bearer token that expires in 8 hours.
elementNotes.multipleEnvironments: If the org has multiple environments, select the correct row first. The querySelector picks the first ant-table-cell-fix-right, which is the first row.
